# Tasks & Deadlines

## Active Tasks (By Priority)

### 🔴 Critical (This Week)

### 🟡 High (Next 2 Weeks)

## Completed Tasks (Last 7 Days)

## Task Status Definitions

- **pending**: Not started
- **in_progress**: Actively working (with progress %)
- **blocked**: Waiting on dependency
- **completed**: Done
- **overdue**: Past due date, not completed
- **cancelled**: No longer needed
- **rescheduled**: Due date moved

## Task Priority Levels

- **🔴 critical**: Must be done this week, blocks other work
- **🟡 high**: Important, should be done within 2 weeks
- **🟢 medium**: Helpful, can be done this month
- **🔵 low**: Nice to have, backlog

## Notes

- Tasks link to calendar events when related (CAL-XXX)
- Planning Agent queries this file for daily/weekly deadlines
- Intake Agent updates task statuses from input.txt
- Completed tasks archived to calendar_archive.md after 7 days
